results.description: Scrapes reviews from Facebook business pages. Returns review text, star ratings, reviewer metadata, and review-level details for reputation monitoring and customer feedback analysis across public Facebook pages.

Scrapes Amazon product reviews across 20+ regional domains with advanced filtering. Returns review text, star ratings, verified-purchase flags, reviewer metadata, timestamps, review media (images/videos), variant association, helpful/vote counts, language tags, and aspect-level sentiment summaries. Supports filtering by rating, keywords, media-only, verified purchases, and an expanded collection mode across star ratings.

notes: Update available: 0.1.0 → 0.1.1. Run `npm update -g @monid-ai/cli` to update monid-cli. Download the latest version of skill at https://monid.ai/SKILL.md.
